claim.targetPopulation: preliminary reviewed TypeScript/JavaScript public-OSS workspace corpus after round2 detector/scope tuning; agent-reviewed manifests and agent labels only
claim.supportedSyntaxProfile: ts-js-supported-v1 with package root/subpath export checks, route-style dotted filenames, resource query stripping, and generated-artifact limitations

samplingPlan.method: deterministic per-rule sampling with perRuleCap=5 and minPerRepository=1 for round2 pilot diagnosis

labelingPlan.limitation: Raters are two Codex-generated preliminary passes, not independent human blind labels.

exclusionRules: out_of_scope labels are excluded from blocking precision denominator by the claim script label taxonomy
invalid_setup labels identify manifest/review setup failures and are not counted as upstream defects
reports generated while the working tree is dirty are preliminary diagnostic artifacts and must be regenerated from a clean commit before any external claim
